message:
test(proptest): add 4 tool function proptests and fix model strategy stack overflow

Add fuzzy_find_text, build_normalized_content, and map_normalized_range
proptests to tools.rs. Fix model.rs proptest stack overflow by reducing
strategy nesting depth (bounded→scalar JSON values, vec sizes 0..3).
Also fix truncation caller sites for &str→String signature change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
